_doc: Real FIFA WC2026 knockout bracket — the 16 Round-of-32 ties in BRACKET order (top->bottom of the tree, NOT chronological), keyed by group-position slot ('1E' = winner of group E, '2B' = runner-up of B, '3D' = best third from D). Consecutive ties feed the next round (ties 2i & 2i+1 -> 1/8 slot i), so this ordering drives the whole projected tree. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH: consumed by src/lib/realData.ts (the live bracket) AND scripts/verify-bracket.mjs (the self-check). Verified against the official bracket (en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup_knockout_stage, RoundN template) and the live API. roundPow = how many R32 ties collapse into one tie of that round.
